stemHtml: Which of the following is most correct regarding the Multi-Crew Cooperation (MCC) concept?

options.a: It is concerned with the effective use of checklists and SOPs, and airmanship. Elements include the principles of threat-and- error management and management of abnormal and emergency situations.
options.b: The main elements are authoritative leadership shown by the Pilot-in-Command, being aware of the principles of error detection and prevention, human perception and illusions, and awareness of the Operator's safety culture.
options.c: It includes many elements, such as: good communication by all the crew members, effective and balanced leadership by the Pilot-in-Command leading to good teamwork, problem solving decision making, and the acceptance of monitoring and cross-checking.
options.d: It is concerned with the effective use of all available resources, including crew members, aircraft systems, support facilities, and other persons, in order to achieve a safe and efficient operation. Elements include automation philosophy, SOPs, error detection and prevention, and the acquisition of information.
